assertionResults.reason: Policy prompt stayed absent when pending operations changed without denial events, and opened reactively after synthetic peer_denied payload enqueue with payload-matched fields.

observables: pending-only refresh check: beforePending=14, afterPending=16, dialog=false
reactive modal content check: dialogOpen=true, hasSignBadge=true, hasPeerLabel=true, hasDomain=true, hasEventKind=true, foundLabels=[EVENT KIND, CONTENT, PUBKEY, DOMAIN]
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured

assertionResults.reason: Prompt rendered sign and ecdh variants from injected payload fields, including expected badge/identity and per-verb detail schemas.

observables: sign variant: dialogOpen=true, hasSignBadge=true, hasPeerIdentity=true, hasEventKindRow=true, hasDomainRow=true
ecdh variant: dialogOpen=true, hasEcdhBadge=true, hasOperationRow=true, hasTargetPubkeyRow=true, hasRelayRow=true
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured

assertionResults.reason: Allow once closed the modal; replaying the same denial id in-session did not re-open; after lock+unlock the same id re-opened, demonstrating session-scoped behavior with reset across lock cycle.

observables: initial queue check after enqueue: dialog=true, queue=[g2-009-b]
after Allow once: afterAllowOnceDialog=false, queue=[]
same-session replay (same id): sameSessionDialog=false, queue=[]
after lock+unlock replay (same id): afterLockDialog=true, queue=[g2-009-b]
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured

assertionResults.reason: Always allow closed the modal and persisted the peer override through lock/unlock; post-unlock policy state remained allow.

observables: primed deny then flipped: respondSignAfterAlwaysAllow=allow
post-unlock persistence check: postUnlockRespondSign=allow
policies view check: respondSign=allow, hasPoliciesHeading=true
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured

assertionResults.reason: Deny dismissed the modal with unchanged policy state; a subsequent identical peer denial (new id) surfaced a new modal.

observables: baseline manual override before deny: allow
after deny: dialog=false, baseline=allow, afterDeny=allow
second denial enqueue: secondDialog=true, queue=[g2-011-deny-2]
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured

assertionResults.reason: Always deny set deny override and it persisted across lock/unlock; policy rows remained unique per peer (no duplicates).

observables: after Always deny + refresh: respondSign=deny, totalStates=2, uniquePeers=2
post-unlock: postUnlockRespondSign=deny, totalStates=2, uniquePeers=2
policies view check: respondSign=deny
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured

assertionResults.reason: Scoped kind/domain CTA variants were not rendered in the modal, and code/docs evidence confirms only peer-level override API is exposed.

observables: modal CTA check: hasAllowOnce=true, hasAlwaysAllow=true, hasDeny=true, hasAlwaysDeny=true, hasKindScoped=false, hasDomainScoped=false
runtimeClient signature: setPolicyOverride({ peer, direction, method, value }) only
WASM d.ts exposes set_policy_override(policy_json: string) without kind/domain scope fields
docs/runtime-deviations-from-paper.md contains explicit VAL-APPROVALS-013 scoped-CTA deviation entry
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured

assertionResults.reason: TTL-driven expiry countdown decremented over time with event TTL source and auto-dismissed at expiry without mutating policy state.

observables: countdown sample 1: t0=44s, ttlSource=event, dialog=true
countdown sample 2 (3s later): t3=40s, dialog=true
rate check sample: 45s -> 41s after ~3s
after expiry: dialogAfterExpiry=false, baseline=deny, afterExpiry=deny, queueLength=0
evidence.network: agent-browser network requests: No requests captured

frictions.description: Immediate post-enqueue reads can report stale queue/dialog state before React commit; a short wait (~300ms) was needed before sampling observables.
frictions.resolution: Added deterministic wait steps before each modal-state capture.

frictions.description: Console contained one relay warning (`wss://relay.damus.io` WebSocket closed before established) while running locally with offline peers.
frictions.resolution: Continued with local synthetic denial-event validation; warning did not block modal/policy assertions.

summary: Validated 8 assertions for prompt core behavior using agent-browser (8 pass, 0 fail, 0 blocked).
